title: DNA Extraction, PCR Amplification, Sequencing and Phylogenetic Analysis
author: Jing Xu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jinckde
materials: The resulting pellet was collected by centrifugation (12,000×g, 15 min), washed twice with 75% ethanol, air-dried, resuspended in 20 μl of sterile Millipore water and deposited in -20℃ freezer for storage.
The amplified products were submitted for sequencing (Invitrogen, Shanghai)

steps.title: Before the extraction of genomic DNA,...
steps.instruction: Before the extraction of genomic DNA, fungal isolate was cultured on PDA plates at 28 °C in darkness for 5-7 days.

steps.title: 100 mg Fungal mycelia were picked...
steps.instruction: 100 mg Fungal mycelia were picked out to a mortar and 1000 μl of CTAB lysis buffer was added to grind at 65°C.

steps.title: The mycelial mixture was transferred to a 1
steps.instruction: The mycelial mixture was transferred to a 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube and 10 μL of β-mercaptoethanol was added.

steps.title: The Eppendorf tube was mixed thoroughly...
steps.instruction: The Eppendorf tube was mixed thoroughly and water-bathed at 65°C for 60 min with continuous shaking.

steps.title: The lysate was extracted with an...
steps.instruction: The lysate was extracted with an equal volume of chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (24:1) and centrifuged at 12,000×g for 8 min at 4 °C.

steps.title: The supernatant was transferred to a...
steps.instruction: The supernatant was transferred to a new microtube and extracted with chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (24:1) at 12,000×g for 8 min at 4 °C.

steps.title: Repeat step 6 once
steps.instruction: Repeat step 6 once. The supernatant was transferred to a new microtube and precipitated by adding a 2× volume of chilled isopropanol for 6 h at −20°C.

steps.title: Set up the PCR reaction procedure...
steps.instruction: Set up the PCR reaction procedure as described below:Step 1 94℃ 5 minutesStep 2 94℃ 40 seconds55℃ 40 seconds72℃ 55 seconds30 Cycles in Step 2Step 3 72℃ 10 minutesStep 4 4℃ hold

steps.title: The ITS-rDNA sequence were obtained, and...
steps.instruction: The ITS-rDNA sequence were obtained, and the cross peaks were removed using BioEdit5.0.6 software.

steps.title: Aligned with the sequences in the...
steps.instruction: Aligned with the sequences in the GenBank by Basic Local Alignment Search Tool (BLAST) programs to find out the sequence homology with closely related organisms (similar≥ 98%).

steps.title: Phylogenetic analyses of the endophytes were...
steps.instruction: Phylogenetic analyses of the endophytes were carried out using MEGA 5.1 software, the neighbor-joining (NJ) method was used to infer the evolutionary history of the fungal isolates, and the bootstrapping was carried out using 1,000 replications.

steps.title: Finally, we submitted ITS-rDNA sequences of...
steps.instruction: Finally, we submitted ITS-rDNA sequences of the representative isolates to GenBank and obtained the accession number.
